title: Apply Perfumes Correctly To Ensure Best Scent Experience – Says Sirtified Perfume CEO, Adetayo Olowookere - FinancialEDGE
description: The Managing Director of Sirtified Perfume and More, Femi Adetayo Olowookere has got his audience awestruck at the venue of a talk show organized for lovers of perfumes and merchants at a popular hotel in Victoria Island, Lagos on Tuesday, October 28, 2025. Adetayo who used the opportunity to share his over twenty years experience
html: The Managing Director of Sirtified Perfume and More, Femi Adetayo Olowookere has got his audience awestruck at the venue of a talk show organized for lovers of perfumes and merchants at a popular hotel in Victoria Island, Lagos on Tuesday, October 28, 2025.
